front: Explain the mechanism of nanoparticle-mediated gene delivery.
back: Cationic lipids (DOTAP, DOTMA) or polymers (PEI, chitosan) condense DNA into nanoparticles (polyplexes). Endosomal escape via proton sponge effect (PEI) or membrane fusion (lipids). Nuclear import required for non-dividing cells. PEGylation reduces opsonization.
